name: Storybook Quest
description: Paper trails, bookmarks, margin notes, and page-turn rewards.

name: BlockWorks
description: Chunky blocks, obby rails, checkpoints, and bouncing build pieces.

name: Mario Course
description: Pipes, coin blocks, flagpoles, hill hops, and bright platform checkpoints.

name: Space Cadets
description: Helldivers-style drops, orbital strikes, stratagems, and Super Earth mission rewards.

name: Luigi's Mansion
description: Luigi's Mansion flashlights, Poltergust pulls, mansion keys, and spooky-green rewards.

name: Wizard School
description: Hogwarts spell cards, Hedwig drops, Bertie Bott's beans, and house-point rewards.

name: Toybox Rescue
description: Toy Story shelf rescues, Buzz launches, Pizza Planet drops, and prize-box rewards.

name: Demigod Camp
description: Poseidon tridents, oracle prophecies, labyrinth runs, and Olympus victories.

name: Silly Rhymes
description: Bent rhyme labels, nonsense tiles, big color pops, and wobble motion.

name: Goat Yard
description: Hay rails, ramps, trophies, and stunt props that crash across the screen.

name: Garden Goose
description: Picnic labels, rake trails, bell rings, and sneaky garden-job props.
